paper-white.$description: Paper White — Primary canvas, all text on dark surfaces, inverted button text

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Dark supporting neutral for text, icons, and strong contrast. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

gallery-gray.$description: Gallery Gray — Secondary surface for section bands, footer background washes

plinth-gray.$description: Plinth Gray — Tertiary surface, alternating section rhythm dividers

carbon-black.$description: Carbon Black — Dark section background for content blocks (writing index, project list) — near-black avoids the harshness of pure #000

slate-black.$description: Slate Black — Secondary dark surface for stacked dark sections

concrete.$description: Concrete — Muted helper text, metadata dates, tertiary annotations on white

stone.$description: Stone — Secondary muted text, labels, non-active annotations

graphite.$description: Graphite — Strongest muted text before full black, subtle emphasis

abc-oracle.$description: Sole typeface for all text — headlines, body, labels, metadata, navigation. The signature choice is using a single 14px size across the entire site: hierarchy comes from weight contrast (400 for body, 500 for titles and active items) and whitespace, never from size. This anti-hierarchical approach treats all information as equally important, like gallery wall text.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background, primary surface

section-band.$description: Surface level 1: Alternating section backgrounds, footer wash

dark-block.$description: Surface level 3: Inverted content sections (writing index, archive)
